meta.title: Emmanuel Alanis - Full-Stack Developer
meta.description: Full-stack developer building scalable web applications with React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

hero.name: Emmanuel Alanis
hero.bio: I build scalable web applications with modern technologies. Currently working as a full-stack developer, crafting enterprise-grade solutions with React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

items.description: Building enterprise web applications with React, Next.js, and TypeScript.
Delivered custom web solutions for clients including delivery platforms, veterinary systems, and SaaS products.
Learned modern web development through building projects and contributing to open source.

items.name: Ready Set
items.description: Full-stack delivery platform with driver, vendor, and customer management. Same-day delivery, on-demand services, and real-time tracking.

items.name: Vet Family
items.description: Veterinary clinic management system for user profiles, pet records, medical history, appointments, and billing.

items.name: Pagare Facil
items.description: Web app for generating customized promissory notes with an intuitive interface for debtor info, payment terms, and PDF generation.

cta.title: Interested in working together?
cta.description: I'm always open to discussing new opportunities and interesting projects.
